underlying_goal: Execute a dead code analysis on a Laravel + FilamentPHP codebase to identify unused code that can be safely removed
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly failed to execute the exact command specified by the user, missing keywords (restored, saving) and adding quotes/generic method names despite repeated explicit corrections, then ran overly broad scans that timed out
brief_summary: User wanted dead code analysis using TLDR tool with specific entry points; after extensive friction with Claude not following exact command specifications and performance issues with full scans, user eventually ran commands manually and achieved results.
